calendar.matters:
Petition For Reissuance Of Letters Testamentary To Executor, And For Instructions Re After Discovered Property Belonging To The Estate
Off Calendar Sep-16-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Walter Cook for David France (Executor).

The Court questions why the Executor doesn't go to another bank. Mr. Cook stated that his Client has gone to four banks, that all of the banks said that the letters need to be currently dated by the Court, and asked if he can have his Client discharged nunc pro tunc or reissue the letters, or if there is any benefit to Mr. France resigning and petitioning for a new Executor. The Court noted that it did not have the finality that is needed for discharge. Mr. Cook stated that he will take the steps that were outlined by the Examiner. The Petition for Reissuance of Letters Testamentary and for Instructions Re After Discovered Property Belonging to Estate is off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
